name: STM32U031 UFQFPN48
description: Generated from the STM32U031 alternate-function workbook and STM32U031F4 datasheet for STM32U031 UFQFPN48. This definition models the UFQFPN48 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32U031 devices provide ultra-low-power Arm Cortex-M0+ routing in compact packages with up to 64 Kbytes of flash memory and 12 Kbytes of SRAM. This package definition exposes 26 peripheral blocks covering 5 timers, 2 low-power timers, 6 serial ports, 2 SPI controllers, 3 I2C controllers, 1 ADC instance, a dual-channel DAC, 1 on-chip operational amplifier, and 1 ultra-low-power comparator.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 10 analog input channels.

peripherals.label: COMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a comparator output.

peripherals.label: DAC1
peripherals.description: Digital-to-analog converter with 1 analog output channel.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals.

peripherals.label: I2C2
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals.

peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals.

peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4, complementary outputs, a break input, and an external trigger input.
